languages.text:
Until the end of the turn, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer 3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}visions of the warp{/g}.
Caster suffers {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Perplexed{/g} until the end of the battle.

Until the end of the turn, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}visions of the warp{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplexed{/g} until the end of combat.

Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}visions of the warp{/g}.
At the end of their turn, {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} is triggered as if the user's {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g} were equal to 5.
The user suffers the {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g} effect, and this {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} malfunctions.

Until the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}visions of the warp{/g}.
At the end of their turn, {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} is triggered as if the user's {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g} were equal to 5.
The user suffers the {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g} effect, and this {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} malfunctions.

languages.text:
До конца хода каждый раз, когда обладатель аугмента совершает атаку, все существа в радиусе 5 клеток вокруг цели получают +3 уровня эффекта {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}холод Имматериума{/g}.
Обладатель аугмента получает +1 уровень {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}замешательства{/g} до конца боя.

The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplexed{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text:
Jusqu'à la fin du tour, chaque fois que l'utilisateur lance une attaque, toutes les unités dans un rayon de 5 cases autour de la cible subissent +3 cumuls de {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Froide étreinte de l'Immaterium{/g}.
L'utilisateur subit +1 cumul de l'effet {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Perplexité{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the turn, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}the cold embrace of the Immaterium{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplexed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Jusqu'à la fin du tour, chaque fois que l'utilisateur lance une attaque, toutes les unités dans un rayon de 5 cases autour de la cible subissent +3 cumuls de {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Froide étreinte de l'Immaterium{/g}.
L'utilisateur subit +1 cumul de l'effet {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Perplexité{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

Jusqu'à la fin du tour, chaque fois que l'utilisateur lance une attaque, toutes les unités dans un rayon de 5 cases autour de la cible subissent +3 cumuls de {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Visions du Warp{/g}.
L'utilisateur subit l'effet {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Perplexité{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, tur sonlanana dek ne zaman bir saldırı gerçekleştirse hedefin etrafındaki 5 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm birimler, +3 {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Tindiyar'ın soğuk kucağı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır.
Kullanıcı, +1 {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

Kullanıcı, +1 {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

Kullanıcı, tur sonlanana dek ne zaman bir saldırı gerçekleştirse hedefin etrafındaki 5 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm birimler, +3 {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}öteboyut görüleri{/g} birikimine maruz kalır.
Kullanıcı, {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}şaşkınlığa{/g} maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text:
直到回合结束，每当使用者发动攻击时，目标周围5格内的所有单位都会承受3层{g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}亚空间的冰冷拥抱{/g}。
使用者承受1层{g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}困惑{/g}，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the turn, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}the cold embrace of the Immaterium{/g}.

使用者承受1层{g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}困惑{/g}，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
Hasta el final de su turno, cada vez que el usuario efectúa un ataque, todas las unidades situadas en un radio de 5 casillas en torno al objetivo reciben +3 acumulaciones de {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}frío abrazo del Inmaterio{/g}.
El usuario sufre +1 acumulación de {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplejo{/g} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the turn, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}the cold embrace of the Immaterium{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplexed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Hasta el final de su turno, cada vez que el usuario efectúa un ataque, todas las unidades situadas en un radio de 5 casillas en torno al objetivo reciben +3 acumulaciones de {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}frío abrazo del Inmaterio{/g}.
El usuario sufre +1 acumulación de {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplejo{/g} hasta el final del combate.

Hasta el final de su turno, cada vez que el usuario efectúa un ataque, todas las unidades situadas en un radio de 5 casillas en torno al objetivo reciben +3 acumulaciones de {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}visiones de la disformidad{/g}.
El usuario sufre {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplejo{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Führt der Nutzer bis zum Ende seines Zuges einen Angriff aus, werden alle Einheiten in einem Radius von 5 Felden um das Ziel mit +3 Stapeln {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Die kalte Umarmung des Immateriums{/g} belegt.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Überrascht{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the turn, whenever the user performs an attack, all units in a 5-cell radius around the target suffer +3 stacks of {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}the cold embrace of the Immaterium{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplexed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Führt der Nutzer bis zum Ende seines Zuges einen Angriff aus, werden alle Einheiten in einem Radius von 5 Felden um das Ziel mit +3 Stapeln {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Die kalte Umarmung des Immateriums{/g} belegt.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Überrascht{/g} belegt.

Führt der Nutzer bis zum Ende seines Zuges einen Angriff aus, werden alle Einheiten in einem Radius von 5 Felden um das Ziel mit +3 Stapeln {g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}Visionen des Warp{/g} belegt.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Überrascht{/g} belegt.

languages.text:
ターン終了まで、使用者が攻撃を行うたびに、対象を中心とした半径5マス以内の全ユニットが{g|f:8f9bac2e470942e4874a50926bff5e73}〈歪み〉の幻視{/g}を+3スタック受ける。
使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}困惑{/g}状態を受ける。

The user suffers {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}perplexed{/g} until the end of combat.
